caption:
Your voicemail greeting is turning missed calls into lost jobs.

Most callers who hit voicemail don't leave one. They call the next business on the list.

Zero-cost fix you can make today:

Rewrite your voicemail greeting to send callers to text instead. Most business phone lines already accept SMS, so the caller doesn't need a new number, only a reason to use the one they already dialed.

Script: "Sorry we missed your call. Text this same number and we'll reply right away."

Test it before you trust it: have a friend call your business line from a number your team won't recognize, let it hit voicemail, then text back. Confirm someone sees it and replies within minutes.

Want the full missed-call recovery system built and automated for your business?

DM "REDIRECT"

#MissedCallRecovery #SpeedToLead #ServiceBusinessGrowth #LeadFollowUp #SmallBusinessMarketing
rationale: Reels remain the reach engine for cold audiences in 2026, and this fills a gap the account hasn't covered: the voicemail greeting itself as the redirect mechanism, a zero-cost fix distinct from the text-back script and missed-call-math angles already shipped.
